mnemonics: Jung's JARGON: Just A Reminder, Good Outcomes Need human-in-the-loop design.
keyPoints: Focuses on human-AI collaboration and co-creation, not just automation.
Emphasizes the importance of designing AI that is understandable and trustworthy for users.
Advocates for a human-in-the-loop approach to ensure AI augments human capabilities.
commonMistakes: Assuming his work is about full automation; it's actually about collaborative intelligence.
Overlooking the emphasis on user trust and explainability in his human-centred framework.
